Mission of the University Advisory Board

University Advisory Board Members

University Executive Board

University Executive Board

Institutionalized to realize Doğuş University’s mission and strategic objective of making effective and efficient use of its proximity to the Dudullu Organized Industrial Zone, and to take concrete and impactful steps in university–industry
        cooperation, the Doğuş University Advisory Board brings together Doğuş University academics and distinguished executives from leading companies and institutions in Türkiye. A sub-committee of this Advisory Board is the Doğuş University–Dudullu
        Organized Industrial Zone Cooperation Executive Board.

The purpose of the Doğuş University–Dudullu Organized Industrial Zone Cooperation Executive Board is to ensure the swift, effective, and efficient implementation of the decisions taken by the Doğuş University Advisory Board within the framework
        of the Scientific, Cultural, and Artistic Cooperation Protocol signed between Doğuş University and Dudullu OIZ, by organizing the collaboration and contributions of all relevant stakeholders.

The Executive Board:

Reports developments and recommendations to the Advisory Board when deemed necessary and at least once every three months.

Consists of a number of members determined by the Advisory Board.

The Advisory Board may make changes to the number of members and to the membership when necessary.

Elects a chair, a vice chair, and a rapporteur from among its members.

The Executive Board is composed of the following members:

Doğuş University:

Director, Research, Application and Advanced Technology Center

Prof. Halit Targan ÜNAL:

Director, DOUSEM Continuing Education Center

Assist. Prof. Özay ÖZAYDIN:

Deputy Director, Research, Application and Advanced Technology Center – Rapporteur

Dudullu Organized Industrial Zone:

Seçil FIRAT:

Neslihan LAYIK:

Administrative Affairs Manager, Dudullu Organized Industrial Zone
